resources:
Treine+ Version %1$s
Track your strength Starting
Train with purpose Track your progress, set goals, and surpass you daily limits I already have an account Create a new account Image of a woman exercising. Back to welcome
Access Welcome back! Continue your training from where you left off" Login Email Password Enter your email Enter your password Forgot your password? Email verified successfully Error checking email Failed to log in, please try again
Create your account" Your access credentials email@example.com Password Confirm password The password must be at least 8 characters long, including letters and numbers Next Complete registration Personal profile What should we call you? Your full name What is your gender? We need this for future customization Masculine Feminine Other What are your goals? This will help us personalize your experience in the app. Mass gain Fat loss Health Email cannot be blank Invalid email Passwords do not match Password must be at least 8 characters The name cannot be empty The name must be longer than 3 characters Something went wrong User successfully registered Failed to register user
Confirm Email Check your email to confirm your account Go to Gmail
Good morning Good afternoon Good night Today\'s training Your weekly progress Choose a training to start Abandon Training? If you leave now, all progress recorded in this training will be lost. Exit and Lose Continue Training Complete Training Default: %1$skg Apply to all: %1$skg You don\'t have any trainings yet. Go to the Trainings tab to create one! %1$d Exercises Start"
Profile Personal information Name Email Gender Birth Date Application information Version Privacy Policy Terms of Use Apply Android dynamic theme The Dynamic Colors feature, added in Android 12, allows you to customize your device\'s colors to match the color scheme of your wallpaper Notification Receive workout reminders Activate Artificial Intelligence Allow Treine+ to use artificial intelligence to suggest workouts and personalize your experience Disable notifications in the app settings Close session Exit Treine+ Are you sure you want to log out? Cancel Confirm Session successfully concluded
Welcome to Train More! Notifications have been enabled Artificial intelligence activated Artificial intelligence deactivated
My Trainings Manage your weekly routine by muscle groups. No training found Add training Delete Training Are you sure you want to delete this training? This action cannot be undone. Delete Cancel Training deleted successfully Failed to delete training Delete training
New Training Save Back Training name Ex: Explosive Full Body Exercises Set sets, reps, and weight Add Exercise Ex: Bench Press Remove Exercise removed Undo Sets Reps Weight (kg) Training saved successfully! Failed to save training. Training name cannot be empty. Please fill in all exercise fields. Add at least one exercise to the training. Values must be between 1 and 20.
Welcome to Treine+ Your portable workout agenda. Register your training sessions, track your consistency, and adjust your routine anytime, anywhere. Get Started
Something went wrong.
